inputs.label: Electricity Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Monthly electricity usage from grid, converted to CO2 using an emission factor of 0.5 kg CO2/kWh.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly electricity usage from grid, converted to CO2 using an emission factor of 0.5 kg CO2/kWh.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şebekeden aylık elektrik kullanımı, 0.5 kg CO2/kWh emisyon faktörü ile CO2'ye dönüştürülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatlicher Strombezug aus dem Netz, umgerechnet in CO₂ mit einem Emissionsfaktor von 0,5 kg CO₂/kWh.

inputs.label: Natural Gas Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Monthly natural gas consumption in cubic meters, with an emission factor of 2.0 kg CO2/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly natural gas consumption in cubic meters, with an emission factor of 2.0 kg CO2/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metreküp cinsinden aylık doğal gaz tüketimi, 2.0 kg CO2/m³ emisyon faktörü ile.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatlicher Erdgasverbrauch in Kubikmetern, mit einem Emissionsfaktor von 2,0 kg CO₂/m³.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption (Vehicles)
inputs.businessContext: Monthly fuel (gasoline/diesel) consumption in liters, using factor 2.3 kg CO2/L.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly fuel (gasoline/diesel) consumption in liters, using factor 2.3 kg CO2/L.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Litre cinsinden aylık yakıt (benzin/motorin) tüketimi, 2.3 kg CO2/L faktörü kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatlicher Kraftstoffverbrauch (Benzin/Diesel) in Litern, Faktor 2,3 kg CO₂/L.

inputs.label: Waste Generated
inputs.businessContext: Monthly solid waste sent to landfill, emission factor 0.5 kg CO2/kg.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly solid waste sent to landfill, emission factor 0.5 kg CO2/kg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık katı atık depolama sahasına gönderilir, emisyon faktörü 0.5 kg CO2/kg.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatlicher fester Abfall, der auf Deponien entsorgt wird, Emissionsfaktor 0,5 kg CO₂/kg.

inputs.label: Water Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Monthly water usage, including treatment and pumping, factor 0.3 kg CO2/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly water usage, including treatment and pumping, factor 0.3 kg CO2/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık su kullanımı, arıtma ve pompalama dahil, faktör 0.3 kg CO2/m³.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatlicher Wasserverbrauch, einschließlich Aufbereitung und Pumpen, Faktor 0,3 kg CO₂/m³.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
